entries.source: "Causes of World War I"
entries.value: "Oorzaken van die Eerste Wereldoorlog"

entries.source: "Effects of the printing press"
entries.value: "Gevolg van die drukpers"

entries.source: "Why did the Roman Empire weaken?"
entries.value: "Waarom verswakte wat Romeinse Rijk?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using History Cause-and-Effect on inspir for humanities learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: 'n praktiese gids vir die gebruik van History Cause-and-Effect op inspir vir leer in die geesteswetenskappe, met prompts, studielusse en veiliger AI-gewoontes.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: 'n sterker studielus

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Pas die sessie aan jou doel aan.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI-tutor

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Vra om 'n klein eerste stap in plaas van 'n definitief antwoord.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Vra die AI om jy redenasie te kontroleer, nie net wat resultaat.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Sluit af deur die idee uit wat geheugen terug te skryf.

entries.source: History Cause-and-Effect
entries.value: Geskiedenis Oorsaak-en-Gevolg

entries.source: History Cause-and-Effect AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Die History Cause-and-Effect AI-leermodus is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: ontleed historiese gebeurtenissen via oorzaken, aanleidingen, gevolg en alternatieve mogelijkheden.

entries.source: History Cause-and-Effect AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: History Cause-and-Effect AI-leermodus: praktiese gids

entries.source: Humanities
entries.value: Geesteswetenskappe

entries.source: Learners exploring humanities topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Leerders wat geesteswetenskaplike onderwerpe verken en praktiese leiding in plaas van 'n generiese antwoordblokkie wil hê.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts om te probeer

entries.source: Start the live mode at History Cause-and-Effect. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Civics Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Begin die lewendig modus by History Cause-and-Effect. Wil jy 'n verwante leervorm, probeer dan Civics Coach. Vir 'n breer beeld van die platform lees jy wat 'n AI-leermaat vir almal sou moet doen.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Begin met voorbeeldprompts.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Vertel die modus wat jy probeert te leer of te maak.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Dat verschil zie jy in die flow. In plek van een enorme reaksie bewegen die beste sessies deur 'n lus: stel 'n doel, probeer iets, krijg terugvoer, herstel die swak plek en kies die volgende aksie.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Die focus is belangrik. 'n algemene chatbot kan byna alles beantwoorde, maar 'n leermodus geeft wat gesprek vorm. Die stuurt jy na wat soort dink, oefen, terugvoer of verkennen waardoor die idee bly hangen.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hierdie is dieselfde gewoonte agter studeren met AI sonder jezelf te besluitdriegen: hou die leerder aktief. AI is wat nuttigst wanneer wat terugvoer geeft op jy dink.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Hierdie modus is vooral nuttig vir leerders wat wil:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for history cause-and-effect with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Hierdie modus is ingestel vir historiese oorsaak-en-gevolg met sy eie aansporings, voorbeelde en leervloei.

entries.source: Trace why events happened.
entries.value: Achterhaal waarom gebeurtenissen plekvonden.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Probeer die stap in jy eie woorde.

entries.source: Use History Cause-and-Effect when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gebruik History Cause-and-Effect wanneer jy 'n sessie wil wat vinnig begin maar homself toch aan jou aanpas. Die eerste doel is nie om indrukwekkend te kskakel. Die eerste doel is om die volgende stap haalbaar te laat voel.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Waar hierdie modus by help

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Waar jy hierna natoe kan

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Jy kan ook begin met 'n ruwe versie van jou regte probleem. 'n rommelige eerste prompt is prima. Die sessie kan wat vlak, die teikengroep, sperdatum en styl verduideliken zodra jy begint.
